'''âth-v-k''' ('''kathavak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unabdicate|unabdicate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-v-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unabdicate|unabdicate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-v-k
|-
! Lemma
| kathavak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithavak|thithavak]] || [[word:jithavak|jithavak]] || [[word:shithavak|shithavak]] || [[word:kithavak|kithavak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthavak|thuthuthavak]] || [[word:jujuthavak|jujuthavak]] || [[word:shushuthavak|shushuthavak]] || [[word:kukuthavak|kukuthavak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthavak|thuthavak]] || [[word:juthavak|juthavak]] || [[word:shuthavak|shuthavak]] || [[word:kuthavak|kuthavak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthavak|thuthavak]] || [[word:juthavak|juthavak]] || [[word:shuthavak|shuthavak]] || [[word:kuthavak|kuthavak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethavak|thethavak]] || [[word:jethavak|jethavak]] || [[word:shethavak|shethavak]] || [[word:kethavak|kethavak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothavak|thothothavak]] || [[word:jojothavak|jojothavak]] || [[word:shoshothavak|shoshothavak]] || [[word:kokothavak|kokothavak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothavak|thothavak]] || [[word:jothavak|jothavak]] || [[word:shothavak|shothavak]] || [[word:kothavak|kothavak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothavak|thothavak]] || [[word:jothavak|jothavak]] || [[word:shothavak|shothavak]] || [[word:kothavak|kothavak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthavak|thĂŠthavak]] || [[word:jĂŠthavak|jĂŠthavak]] || [[word:shĂŠthavak|shĂŠthavak]] || [[word:kĂŠthavak|kĂŠthavak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathavak|thathathavak]] || [[word:jajathavak|jajathavak]] || [[word:shashathavak|shashathavak]] || [[word:kakathavak|kakathavak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathavak|thathavak]] || [[word:jathavak|jathavak]] || [[word:shathavak|shathavak]] || [[word:kathavak|kathavak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathavak|thathavak]] || [[word:jathavak|jathavak]] || [[word:shathavak|shathavak]] || [[word:kathavak|kathavak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathavak|shathavak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathavak|goshathavak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathavak|gokishathavak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathavaknĂŒ|shathavaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathavaknknĂŒ|goshathavaknknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathavaknĂŒ|gokishathavaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathavakshĂ«|shathavakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathavaknkshĂ«|goshathavaknkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathavakshĂ«|gokishathavakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathavakro|shathavakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathavaknkro|goshathavaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathavakro|gokishathavakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathavakmu|shathavakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathavaknkmu|goshathavaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathavakmu|gokishathavakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathavaksher|shathavaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathavaknksher|goshathavaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathavaksher|gokishathavaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathavakng|shathavakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathavaknkng|goshathavaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathavakng|gokishathavakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathavakya|shathavakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathavaknkya|goshathavaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathavakya|gokishathavakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathavakyam|shathavakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathavaknkyam|goshathavaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathavakyam|gokishathavakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathavaknĂŒshĂ«|shathavaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathavaknknĂŒshĂ«|goshathavaknknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathavaknĂŒshĂ«|gokishathavaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathavaknĂŒro|shathavaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathavaknknĂŒro|goshathavaknknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathavaknĂŒro|gokishathavaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathavaknĂŒmu|shathavaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathavaknknĂŒmu|goshathavaknknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathavaknĂŒmu|gokishathavaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathavakshĂ«nĂŒ|shathavakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathavaknkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshathavaknkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathavakshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishathavakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathavakshĂ«ro|shathavakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathavaknkshĂ«ro|goshathavaknkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathavakshĂ«ro|gokishathavakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathavakshĂ«mu|shathavakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathavaknkshĂ«mu|goshathavaknkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathavakshĂ«mu|gokishathavakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathavakronĂŒ|shathavakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathavaknkronĂŒ|goshathavaknkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathavakronĂŒ|gokishathavakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathavakroshĂ«|shathavakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathavaknkroshĂ«|goshathavaknkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathavakroshĂ«|gokishathavakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathavakromu|shathavakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathavaknkromu|goshathavaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathavakromu|gokishathavakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathavakmunĂŒ|shathavakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathavaknkmunĂŒ|goshathavaknkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathavakmunĂŒ|gokishathavakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathavakmushĂ«|shathavakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathavaknkmushĂ«|goshathavaknkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathavakmushĂ«|gokishathavakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathavakmuro|shathavakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathavaknkmuro|goshathavaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathavakmuro|gokishathavakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
